creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
scheidell    2011-11-29 14:56:21 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/pam_fprint  Makefile distinfo 
    security/pam_fprint/files patch-src_pam_fprint.c 
                              pkg-message.in 
  Added files:
    security/pam_fprint/files patch-src_Makefile.am 
                              patch-src_pam__fprint__enroll.c 
  Removed files:
    security/pam_fprint/files patch-src_Makefile.in 
  Log:
    - Submitter is now Maintainer
    - There's one more commit after version 0.2 on github. After that, the
  software discontinued. This version is adopted
    by Debian
    - added alocal/automake
    - Committed with changed (added IGNORE for FreeBSD < 8.x since libusb
  1.0 is needed, see libfprint)
  
  PR:             161225
  Submitted by:   Zhihao Yuan <lichray@gmail.com>
  Approved by:    ports (maintainer timeout) gabor (mentor)
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.8       +19 -6     ports/security/pam_fprint/Makefile
  1.3       +2 -2      ports/security/pam_fprint/distinfo
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/security/pam_fprint/files/patch-src_Makefile.am (new)
  1.2       +0 -20     ports/security/pam_fprint/files/patch-src_Makefile.in (dead)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/security/pam_fprint/files/patch-src_pam__fprint__enroll.c (new)
  1.2       +57 -3     ports/security/pam_fprint/files/patch-src_pam_fprint.c
